en_title: With Xbox Speeding Up Work on New Fallout Games, One Former Bethesda Dev Warns Faster Sequels 'Risk Fan Fatigue' — but Could New Vegas Developer Obsidian Be Drafted in to Help?
cn_title: XBOX加速《辐射》新作，前B社/贝塞斯达开发者警告粉丝疲劳
subtitle: 快也有代价
opus_summary: 微软据称正加速《辐射》等核心系列开发，前B社开发者Bruce Nesmith警告，缩短周期可能牺牲质量并让续作令粉丝失望。Obsidian是否会再参与《辐射》也引发猜测。

paragraphs.en: New Xbox boss Asha Sharma is reportedly speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as she prepares to hit the “reset” button on Microsoft’s gaming business. Now, Fallout fans are wondering what this means for new games in the post-apocalyptic franchise, while one former Fallout developer has cautioned against pumping out more big new Fallout games faster.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，新任XBOX负责人Asha Sharma准备为微软游戏业务按下「重置」按钮，并正在加快新《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏的开发。现在，《辐射》粉丝正在猜测这对这个末日废土系列的新作意味着什么，同时一位前《辐射》开发者也警告称，更快推出更多大型《辐射》新作可能并非好事。

paragraphs.en: The last mainline Fallout video game was 2018’s Fallout 76 , which added multiplayer elements to the traditionally single-player open world role-playing series. It is now over a decade since Fallout 4 came out. The promised Fallout 5 , which will not arrive until after The Elder Scrolls 6, seems a long way away indeed .
paragraphs.cn: 上一款《辐射》主线游戏是2018年的《辐射76》，它为这个传统上以单人开放世界RPG为主的系列加入了多人元素。距离《辐射4》发售已经过去十多年。此前承诺的《辐射5》要等到《上古卷轴6》之后才会到来，看起来确实还很遥远。

paragraphs.en: Could Bethesda follow The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered and release a remaster of Fallout 3 or New Vegas, or perhaps even a Fallout: New Vegas 2 as a stop gap? In a recent interview with IGN, Howard remained coy on the possibility , although remasters are reportedly still in the works.
paragraphs.cn: B社会不会效仿《上古卷轴4：湮灭 复刻版》，推出《辐射3》或《新维加斯》的复刻版，甚至用《辐射：新维加斯2》来填补空档？Howard最近接受IGN采访时，对这种可能性仍然语焉不详，不过据报道，复刻项目仍在开发中。

paragraphs.en: Either way, it seems clear that Microsoft wants more from Fallout as well as its other big hitters, and Fallout fans themselves are keen to find out what’s next from the franchise. But Skyrim lead designer Bruce Nesmith, who left Bethesda at the end of Starfield development, said faster sequels “risk fan fatigue.”
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，微软显然希望从《辐射》和其他重磅系列中榨出更多产出，《辐射》粉丝自己也急切想知道这个系列下一步会走向哪里。但曾在B社参与开发、并在《星空》开发结束后离开的《上古卷轴5：天际》首席设计师Bruce Nesmith表示，更快推出续作「有让粉丝疲劳的风险」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to , Nesmith said: “In my opinion, the biggest risks of shortened schedules is quality, reduced features, polish, or bugs. The things that are done last end up getting set aside to complete the game on time. And of course faster dev times would result in faster sequels. But that’s the wrong question. Those sequels risk disappointing fans.”
paragraphs.cn: Nesmith表示：「在我看来，缩短开发周期最大的风险是质量、功能减少、打磨不足或Bug。那些最后才完成的东西，最终会为了按时完成游戏而被搁置。当然，更快的开发时间会带来更快的续作。但这不是正确的问题。那些续作有让粉丝失望的风险。」

paragraphs.en: One potential solution is having other studios make either mainline sequels or spinoffs. Could Bethesda have Microsoft-owned Fallout: New Vegas developer Obsidian, for example, make Fallout: New Vegas 2?
paragraphs.cn: 一种潜在解决方案，是让其他工作室制作主线续作或衍生作品。比如，B社能否让同属微软旗下、曾开发《辐射：新维加斯》的Obsidian来制作《辐射：新维加斯2》？

paragraphs.en: In a recent interview with The 41st Precinct , Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer, who is still at Obsidian, said that he’s not making a new Fallout game until he is — because that’s a decision that would come from on high, as it did when he was tasked with making New Vegas.
paragraphs.cn: 仍在Obsidian任职的《辐射：新维加斯》总监Josh Sawyer最近接受The 41st Precinct采访时表示，在真正轮到他之前，他并没有在制作新的《辐射》游戏，因为这类决定来自更高层，就像当年他被指派制作《新维加斯》时一样。

paragraphs.en: “These are things that take place above my head, right?” Sawyer responded when asked if he thought Obsidian might be given the chance to make a Fallout sequel or remake or be involved in the franchise in any way again.
paragraphs.cn: 当被问到他是否认为Obsidian有机会再次获得制作《辐射》续作、重制版，或以任何方式参与该系列的机会时，Sawyer回答：「这些事情发生在我头顶之上，对吧？」

paragraphs.en: “I'm just a director. I'm the studio design director, which is kind of an advisory position to the teams, and then I'm a game director. But there are titans above me who decide what happens with IPs and things like that. It's not up to me.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我只是一个总监。我是工作室设计总监，这对各个团队来说有点像顾问职位，同时我也是游戏总监。但在我之上还有巨头决定IP和这类事情会怎样发展。这不是我能决定的。」

paragraphs.en: “So one day you'll just find out you've got to make a Fallout game?”, Sawyer was asked.
paragraphs.cn: 对方问：「所以有一天你会突然发现自己必须做一款《辐射》游戏？」

paragraphs.en: “Well, it's how it happened with New Vegas, so who knows?” he replied.
paragraphs.cn: 他回答：「嗯，当年《新维加斯》就是这么来的，所以谁知道呢？」

paragraphs.en: Obsidian is without a new announced project after both Avowed and The Outer Worlds 2 failed to hit commercial targets . There are rumors the developer is making another Avowed game, but The Outer Worlds 3 is reportedly not in development. On a more positive note, Grounded 2 — yet another 2025 launch — was a hit. But of the three games Obsidian released last year, it had the shortest (and almost certainly the cheapest) development period by far.
paragraphs.cn: 在《宣誓》和《天外世界2》都未能达到商业目标后，Obsidian目前没有公布新的项目。有传言称这家开发商正在制作另一款《宣誓》游戏，但据报道《天外世界3》并未在开发中。更积极的一面是，同样在2025年推出的《Grounded 2》取得了成功。不过在Obsidian去年推出的三款游戏中，它的开发周期最短，而且几乎可以肯定也是最便宜的一款。

paragraphs.en: "I know everyone on the internet, on every game we ever announce, will constantly reference back to, 'When's the next New Vegas?'" Obsidian's VP of operations Marcus Morgan said last year , referencing the studio's beloved Fallout game that's served as the inspiration for the hit Amazon TV series' second season setting.
paragraphs.cn: Obsidian运营副总裁Marcus Morgan去年提到这款深受玩家喜爱的《辐射》作品时说：「我知道网上所有人都会在我们每次公布游戏时不断提起，‘下一款《新维加斯》什么时候来？’」《辐射：新维加斯》也为热门Amazon剧集第二季的故事舞台提供了灵感。

paragraphs.en: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma sent shockwaves through the video game industry with her now infamous “reset” memo, in which she revealed that Microsoft's gaming business has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin). "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX CEO Asha Sharma此前那封如今已经颇具争议的「重置」备忘录震动了整个游戏行业。她在备忘录中透露，微软游戏业务的问责利润率为3%（外界推测指利润率）。Sharma表示：「不计Activision Blizzard King，过去五年里，我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴的持续投资上花费了超过200亿美元（约合人民币1438亿元），但同期年收入却下降了近5亿美元（约合人民币36亿元）。往后，这种情况不能继续下去。」

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg's Jason Schreier has warned of a “bloodbath” at Xbox , with five studios said to be under threat of closure . Meanwhile, Microsoft is reassessing its investment in externally developed games. It just pulled funding for IO Interactive’s upcoming fantasy project , which Xbox was set to publish. Hideo Kojima’s Xbox horror game OD, however, is safe from the chopping block .
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社记者Jason Schreier曾警告XBOX将迎来一场「血洗」，据称有五家工作室面临关闭威胁。与此同时，微软正在重新评估对外部开发游戏的投资。它刚刚撤回了IO Interactive即将推出的奇幻项目资金，该项目原本将由XBOX发行。不过，小岛秀夫的XBOX恐怖游戏《OD》没有被砍掉。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft told Bloomberg it is “taking a fresh look at where we invest so we’re focusing on our highest priorities.”
paragraphs.cn: 微软告诉彭博社，它正在「重新审视我们的投资方向，以便聚焦最高优先级」。

paragraphs.en: “We're not reducing our overall investment in games. We expect to invest about the same in content as we did last year. What's changing is where we're investing and the kinds of projects we're backing,” Microsoft said.
paragraphs.cn: 微软表示：「我们并没有减少对游戏的总体投资。我们预计在内容上的投资规模会与去年大致相同。变化的是我们投资的位置，以及我们支持的项目类型。」

paragraphs.en: It increasingly looks like that means investing in more games in franchises such as Fallout. Earlier this month, The Information reported that Sharma plans to “boost spending on new Xbox games from its most popular franchises to excite die-hard fans,” while also making significant layoffs. Fallout and Elder Scrolls are said to be “two particular areas of focus” due to their “iconic status in the gaming world” and the fact that they haven’t produced new mainline titles in years.
paragraphs.cn: 这越来越像是意味着微软会在《辐射》等系列上投入更多。本月早些时候，The Information报道称，Sharma计划「提高热门系列新XBOX游戏的支出，以激发铁杆粉丝的热情」，同时也会进行大规模裁员。据称，《辐射》和《上古卷轴》是「两个特别重点领域」，原因是它们在游戏世界中拥有「标志性地位」，而且多年没有推出新的主线作品。
